zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont於1510年7月16日出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特時，他的父親Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont41歲，母親Joan Empson45歲。他於1532年11月25日與Elizabeth Babington在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他於1539年在英國諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆被列為mp for nottingham。他去世於1564年3月21日在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont于1510年7月16日出生在英国諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特时，他的父亲Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont41岁，母亲Joan Empson45岁。他于1532年11月25日与Elizabeth Babington在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他于1539年在英国諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆被列为mp for nottingham。他去世于1564年3月21日在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特。

nameMeanings.name: Pierrepont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont was born on 16 July 1510, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont, was 41 and his mother, Joan Empson, was 45. He married Elizabeth Babington on 25 November 1532, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. In 1539, at the age of 29, his occupation is listed as mp for nottingham in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England. He died on 21 March 1564, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont est né le 16 juillet 1510, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Empson, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Babington le 25 novembre 1532, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. En 1539, à l’âge de 29 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est mp for nottingham à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1564, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont am 16. Juli 1510 in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont 41 und seine Mutter Joan Empson 45. Er hat am 25. November 1532 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Babington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. 1539, als er 29 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als mp for nottingham in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. März 1564 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Babington il 25 novembre 1532, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Nel 1539, all'età di 29 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come mp for nottingham nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England. Morì il 21 marzo 1564, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepontが1510年7月16日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントで生まれた時，父Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepontは41歳，母Joan Empsonは45歳であった。1532年11月25日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでElizabeth Babingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。1539年，29歳の時，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムでの職業はmp for nottinghamと記録されている。彼は1564年3月21日に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont(이)가 1510년 7월 16일 영국 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Empson(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1532년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 Elizabeth Babington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1539년, 29세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 mp for nottingham이었다. 그는 1564년 3월 21일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont nasceu em 16 de julho de 1510, em Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan Empson, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Babington em 25 de novembro de 1532, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Em 1539, com 29 anos, sua profissão aparece como mp for nottingham em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 21 de março de 1564, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont родился 16 июля 1510 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Empson, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Babington 25 ноября 1532 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. В 1539 году, в возрасте 29 лет,  он работал по профессии mp for nottingham в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. Он умер 21 марта 1564 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont nació el 16 de julio de 1510, en Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan Empson, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Babington el 25 de noviembre de 1532, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. En 1539, a la edad de 29 años, su ocupación registrada era mp for nottingham en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1564, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
